title: How to Make Your AI Writing Less Robotic (and Actually ...
text: By consciously guiding the LLM to adopt a specific persona and strategically using personal pronouns and examples (with appropriate caution), you can move beyond robotic text and create content that feels more like it was written by an actual human (or at least a very well-programmed one). By providing examples and guiding the LLM to understand the *underlying techniques* that make that writing human-like, you’re giving it a more robust understanding of what you’re trying to achieve. Like with CGI in movies, trying *too hard* to make AI writing perfectly human can sometimes backfire and make the writing feel unsettling or “off.” There’s a point where the subtle imperfections of genuine human writing are missing, which becomes noticeable negatively.

title: How to Make AI Sound More Human or More Like You
text: They asked a great question: **“Can we make AI writing sound less like AI?”** # **Analyze Your Own Writing Style - and Teach It to AI** Your job is to analyze them and generate a style block that I can reuse in other prompts to help an AI model replicate my writing style.` > `When generating content, avoid language patterns commonly associated with AI-generated writing. If you want the AI to write like you, or follow specific structure and format just paste in a piece of your own writing and say something like: **“Mimic this tone, vocabulary, and sentence structure.”**This gives the model a tangible example of what you sound like. title: Humanize AI Content: Make AI Writing Authentic & Relatable
text: Humanizing AI-generated content is essential for creating authentic connections with readers, boosting engagement, and strengthening trust.While AI brings speed and efficiency to content creation, **Humanized AI Content** ensures the final output resonates with people on an emotional and personal level. Humanized AI Content helps brands build stronger trust, deliver authentic messaging, and enhance visibility by making AI-generated text more relatable, engaging, and user-friendly. When you humanize AI content, you’re not just improving tone — you’re aligning with the needs of both algorithms and readers: “**Treat AI as a draft, not a voice…** Tone and emotional pull always come from a human pass.” — Bhavik, Founder & Content Lead at Ohh My Brand (Featured.com) “Implementing a collaborative approach where human editors refine AI-generated copy ensures **content resonates emotionally and improves engagement metrics.**” — Dhari, CTO & Founder at Ubuy Peru (Featured.com)

title: AI-Generated Content Is Ruining Your Brand and How to ...
text: Brands that use AI-generated content without thorough **human enhancement and optimization** may end up with bland and uninspiring material that fails to engage audiences. **Our Take:** AI-generated content often sounds robotic, generic, and overly "AI-like." Instead of reflecting a brand’s unique personality, it tends to follow predictable structures, making it obvious that it wasn’t written by a human. Human editors must ensure that AI-generated content is strategically structured, optimized for engagement, and aligned with business goals. AI is a powerful tool, but it **should not be used as an automatic content replacement.** Instead, AI-generated content should serve as a **starting point** that is **reworked, refined, and optimized** by human editors to ensure originality, accuracy, and engagement.

title: AI in Content Marketing: How We're Wielding AI for Good
text: * How Is AI Used in Content Marketing? * AI Content Marketing Tools ## How Is AI Used in Content Marketing? * **Content Creation**: AI can assist in drafting content, helping marketers brainstorm, or even suggesting SEO-friendly keywords. AI can help create *SEO-friendly drafts*, but the content it generates often lacks the depth and nuance needed to rank well. And, while AI tools like Jasper or ChatGPT are fantastic at helping writers optimize their content for search engines, they’re not yet capable of writing with the insight and emotional intelligence needed to keep readers engaged. ## AI Content Marketing Tools Now that you know how AI can help you with your content marketing, let’s take a look at some of the best AI tools to streamline your content marketing efforts:
